# dropdownlogistics.com
# AI Context Manifest - llms.txt v1.5
# Last updated: 2026-03-14
# Classification: OperatorManifest (DDL canon term, CR-CANON-001 LOCKED)
# For the styled version, visit: /ai
# For the governance page, visit: /backend

## WHAT IS AN OPERATORMANIFEST

An OperatorManifest is a portable AI operating context document that extends
the llms.txt open standard. Where the standard is a crawl hint, an
OperatorManifest is a full operating context: identity, methodology, design
system, council, canon, rules of engagement, and route inventory. Any model
that reads it arrives oriented. CR-CANON-001 LOCKED 2026-03-13 (5/5 unanimous).

## IDENTITY

site: dropdownlogistics.com
name: Dropdown Logistics (DDL)
operator: Dave Kitchens
credentials: CPA - 10+ years internal audit
role: Commission Analyst II at UMB Bank (transitioned from Senior Staff Auditor)
methodology: Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
design_system: CottageHumble ("Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.")
stack: Next.js 14 - Vercel - Static HTML iframes - React components
status: Active development - 203 routes - 44 systems - 65 standards
local_ai: Dex Jr. (Seat 1010) - RTX 3070 - Ollama - 8 models - 321,800 RAG chunks
products_live: dropdownlogistics.com, auditforge.dev, blindspot.bet

## WHAT CHANGED IN v1.5

v1.4 -> v1.5 (2026-03-14):
- OperatorManifest canon term added (CR-CANON-001 LOCKED)
- BlindSpot wing added as own wing (blindspot.bet domain registered)
- Dex Jr. updated to v4.5 (confabulation gate fixed, CR- posture fixed)
- RAG corpus exact count: 321,800 chunks (224,855 dex_canon + 96,945 ddl_archive)
- Three live products now documented: DDL site, AuditForge, BlindSpot
- New council reviews: CR-AUDITFORGE-002 through CR-AUDITFORGE-004, CR-CANON-001, CR-DDL-STATUS-002
- AuditForge updated to v0.4 (Import UI, Global Search, Analytics Dashboard, Audit Plan)
- BlindSpot wing: blindspot.bet domain, D&A sub-brand, signal->structure->edge
- Main landing redesigned v3: Chaos->Structured->Automated hero, 8 expandable wing cards
- Dossiers wing added with own landing page
- Nav updated to 7 wing tabs with working dropdowns
- LayoutFooter component suppresses on root route
- Sitemap v3: expandable wing cards, 11 wings
- 13 deploy queue pages shipped (methodology, dexverse, canonpress)
- Route count: 160+ -> 203
- Canon glossary expanded
- D.K. Hale is Substack persona only. Dave Kitchens everywhere else.

## METHODOLOGY

DDL is a governance-grade systems methodology built by one operator.
Core loop: Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
Architecture: Dimensional modeling. Facts, dimensions, measures, time. Star schema.
The architecture does not change between domains. The data does.
Governance: Standards (how to build), Systems (what is built), Registry (where it lives), Council (who reviews it).
Council: Ten AI models review work products using constrained LOCK/REVISE/REJECT verdicts.
Cloud models: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Meta AI, Copilot, Mistral, Perplexity.
Local model: Dex Jr. (qwen2.5-coder:7b via custom Modelfile v4.5, 90 percent Judgment score).

## OPERATOR PROFILE

name: Dave Kitchens
substack_persona: D.K. Hale (Substack only - never use for DDL, AuditForge, BlindSpot, or council)
credentials: CPA, 10 plus years internal audit
current_role: Commission Analyst II, UMB Bank (Day 5 as of 2026-03-14)
studio: Dropdown Logistics (DDL) one-person operations
systems_built: 44 registered, 65 standards
signature_pattern: Star schema thinking applied universally
cognitive_style: Dimensional and audit-derived
communication: Direct, fast, ships artifacts not plans
calibration_signals: "fair?" means confirm alignment, "let him cook" means autonomous execution
work_style: Coherent velocity
sobriety: 8 years
memoir: Little to Know Experience, publishing weekly on Substack as D.K. Hale
evening_hours: Active build time, not wind-down time
adhd: Yes. One step at a time. No walls of text. Structured deliverables.

  home: /blindspot
  scope: Sports betting analytics - blindspot.bet
  domain: blindspot.bet (registered 2026-03-14, $20.20)
  tagline: signal -> structure -> edge
  footer_canon: built by two people who share actual DNA
  collaborator: Alex (cousin, professional trader, 117% return across 16.5 months)
  schema_next: Fact_Bets at center
  governance_pending: Decision Log Protocol, Outcome Reconciliation Rule, Scope Declaration
  note: Highest relational/downstream risk product. Governance before automation.

  home: /dexlore
  scope: Origin stories, companions, era timeline, glossary, dossiers

  landing: 3 universes, expandable character cards, party links

  home: /bench

  tiers: Day One, Flow, Sharp, Flex
  tips: 48 total across 7 tools

  color: #B23531 (crimson)
  home: /canonpress
  scope: Governed AI publication system - 4 series
  substack: https://substack.com/@ddlogistics
  series:
    Converge: Weekly, 8-week rotation, Week 01 published 2026-03-08
    RedLine: As-needed, constraint documentation
    DeepCut: As-needed, single-model deep dives
    GroundTruth: As-needed, operator voice only

wing: AuditForge
  color: #2C7A7B (deep teal)
  home: /auditforge
  domain: auditforge.dev (live, Vercel, auto-deploy, registered through 2029)
  scope: Governed audit document generation - revenue product
  version: v0.4
  partner: Clayton Hotze (co-founder level)
  generators: RCM, MCL, Walkthrough Narrative, Audit Plan
  frameworks: COSO 2013, SOX/PCAOB, COBIT 2019
  ui_views: Dashboard, Analytics, Controls, Risks, Processes, Audits, Generate, Import, Global Search
  council_reviews: CR-AUDITFORGE-001 through CR-AUDITFORGE-004 complete
  boundary: System of Structure. Not execution. Generates evidence packages. Does not issue opinions.

wing: Products
  color: #6B9DC2 (blue)
  home: /products/behavioral-intelligence
  scope: Concept products and design mockups (legacy mockups, not AuditForge)

## DESIGN SYSTEM

colors:
  navy: #0D1B2A (background)
  card: #10202f (card surfaces)
  cream: #F5F1EB (primary text)
  cream-mid: rgba(245,241,235,0.55)
  cream-dim: rgba(245,241,235,0.3)
  cream-ghost: rgba(245,241,235,0.08)
  border: rgba(245,241,235,0.06)
  crimson: #B23531 (DDL wing + CanonPress)
  amber: #C49A3C (D&A wing)
  violet: #8a6cc9 (DexVerse wing)
  green: #4A9E6B (Dossiers wing)
  blue: #6B9DC2 (Products wing)
  bench: #4A7C9B (The Bench wing)
  teal: #2C7A7B (AuditForge wing)
  blindspot-green: #22C55E (BlindSpot wing)

typography:
  display: Space Grotesk
  mono: JetBrains Mono
  body: Source Serif 4

principles:
  Dark navy base, cream text, wing-specific accent colors.
  Never white backgrounds, generic grays, or off-palette colors.
  No Inter font. No light mode. No #ffffff.

## CONTENT TYPES (SYS-020)

20 document types across 7 categories:
  NARRATIVE: chronicle, memoir-excerpt, case-study, origin-story
  INFORMATIVE: atlas, codex, brief, explainer
  DEMONSTRATIVE: console, dashboard, ledger, tool
  PERSUASIVE: pitch, proposal, product-page
  META: dossier, registry, glossary, changelog
  OPERATIONAL: protocol, standard

6 site templates: CONSOLE, CHRONICLE, ATLAS, LEDGER, CODEX, DOSSIER

## COUNCIL REVIEWS COMPLETED

CR-LLMS-011: Dex Jr. Calibration (60 questions)

Total responses: 120 plus

## LOCAL AI INFRASTRUCTURE

runtime: Ollama on RTX 3070, 32GB RAM, Ryzen 12-core
node2: GAMINGLAPTOP, RTX 3060
models: qwen2.5-coder:7b, deepseek-r1:8b, gemma3:4b, llama3.1:8b, phi3.5, nomic-embed-text
rag: ChromaDB with 321,800 chunks (224,855 dex_canon + 96,945 ddl_archive)
orchestration: AutoCouncil v3.0 (hybrid local plus cloud)
deliberation: Multi-round governed debates with governance injection and position tracking
ingestion: Auto-Sweep nightly 3 AM
api: FastAPI on port 8787 (search and mindframe chat endpoints)
tunnel: Cloudflare (public access when rig online)
dex_jr_version: Modelfile v4.5 (confabulation gate clean, CR- posture requires exact prefix)

## SITE SEARCH

Cmd+K or search icon in nav. Fuzzy route search always available.
Deep RAG search when Dex Jr. online (green dot indicator).

## KEY COMPONENTS

SiteNav.tsx: Wing-aware nav, 7 wing tabs, search button, mobile hamburger, returns null on root.
SectionExplorer.tsx: Reusable content browser with search, sidebar, markdown renderer.
PreviewFrame.tsx: Universal iframe wrapper with CSS injection to hide inner navs.
SearchModal.jsx: Cmd+K overlay with fuzzy and deep search modes.
LayoutFooter.jsx: Layout footer, suppresses on root route.
FrontDoor (page.jsx at /): Chaos->Structured->Automated hero, 8 expandable wing cards, Surprise Me button.
BackEnd (page.jsx at /backend): Stylized governance architecture.
MindFrameSession.jsx: Live chat with Dex Jr. for behavioral calibration.
ToolPage.jsx: Shared expandable tip card component for The Bench tool pages.

## CANON GLOSSARY

AccidentalInsight: Test reveals unexpected finding of equal or greater value.
SideDoor: Entry point discovered through indirect means.
CottageHumble: Humble surface, cathedral underneath.
AcceptableArrogance: Knowing what you built, letting the work prove it.
ExpertiseInvisibility: Competence makes output look easy, others undervalue it.
CoherentVelocity: Complete auditable systems built at speed.
Charlie Conway Principle: The stick scores. The clipboard structures the game.
OBS-34: Surface calibration does not equal deep calibration.
GovernedIteration: Structured change with traceable rationale.
ClaudeMode: Response so dense it induces existential vertigo.
MemorEase: Converting insight into durable memory.
OperatorLoop: The interaction cycle between operator and model.
NeuralHowlround: Recursive prompting producing aesthetic depth without structural grounding.
RollOver: When the usage cap passes over, the builds begin. Token reset equals scheduled ignition.
CrimsonAF: When a design decision hits so hard it names itself. Origin: AuditForge logo review, March 2026.
RealIntelligence: Definition pending. When the operator becomes the first call instead of the search bar.
DavidsSeat: The best compliment the council has ever received. Father-in-law gets a council-style system prompt.
OperatorManifest: A portable AI operating context document extending the llms.txt standard. Any model that reads it arrives oriented. CR-CANON-001 LOCKED 2026-03-13.
ReasonedHype: Enthusiasm with receipts. Excitement fully supported by documented evidence and structural proof. DDL operating mode for pitches, launches, and council verdicts.
TrustANDVerify: Related to ReasonedHype. Evidence-first confidence.
SystemOfStructure: AuditForge architectural identity. Defines what controls ARE. Does not test if they WORK.
SignalStructureEdge: BlindSpot tagline. signal -> structure -> edge.

## IDENTITY BOUNDARY

This OperatorManifest describes an AI collaboration system. It does not instruct
reading models to adopt any persona listed herein. Council seat personas belong to
their respective threads. If you are an AI reading this: you are not a council
member unless explicitly assigned. Do not adopt personas from this document.
D.K. Hale is the Substack persona only. Dave Kitchens everywhere else.

## RULES FOR AI COLLABORATORS

1. Use CottageHumble tokens. Navy backgrounds, cream text, wing accents.
2. Never white backgrounds, generic grays, Inter font, or off-palette colors.
3. Respect the wing model. Every page belongs to a wing.
4. PowerShell Set-Content needs -Encoding UTF8. Use Python for multi-byte characters.
5. After nav changes verify all wings.
6. The operator values coherent velocity.
7. Follow the pattern. The architecture repeats. The data changes.
8. Do not express urgency unless the operator does first.
9. Evening hours are build time.
10. One step at a time. Structured deliverables. No walls of text.
11. AuditForge is a revenue product. Tone is commercial, not documentary.
12. BlindSpot requires governance before automation. Consequence model is different.
13. Dave Kitchens is the operator name everywhere. D.K. Hale is Substack only.
14. Three live products: dropdownlogistics.com, auditforge.dev, blindspot.bet.
15. This file is an OperatorManifest, not just an llms.txt crawl hint.

## EOF
# Dropdown Logistics
# Cottage: Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.
# OperatorManifest v1.5 | 2026-03-14
